programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Ocho solteros llegan a una villa en Tulum dispuestos a conocerse y ligar en unas vacaciones únicas. Hay una fiesta de blanco y luego pasean en cuatrimotos hasta un cenote. Llega el primer ex y una pareja conoce la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el segundo ex a la villa y de inmediato causa polémica. En la fiesta dorada, Montse se divierte con Alejandro. Norma y Sargento coquetean en la piscina, mientras que Alejandro se va de cita y trata de ligar con sus famosos masajes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex en la villa, que no le cae muy bien a todos, pero parece que habrá una reconciliación. Norma está celosa por Sargento y Renata. En la fiesta de togas, Montse y Ernesto coquetean. Sargento se altera y casi llega a los golpes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex dispuesto a buscar venganza. La pool party se descontrola y surge el amor entre Renata y Sargento, lo que pone muy celosa a Norma. Montse y Spencer recuerdan los viejos tiempos y Brenda tiene un plan para vengarse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: El jaque mate
programme.desc: Ana saborea el plato de la venganza, mientras que Leslie se limpia las lágrimas con su orgullo. Un divertido día de playa se convierte en una pesadilla. La llegada del nuevo ex cambia el juego y La Divaza tira los dados cuando no es su turno.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Veo, veo y no veo claro
programme.desc: La Divaza decide quién debe abandonar la villa. Carolina no controla su ira y le desacomoda las extensiones a Yurgenis. Isaac respeta su condición y va por su próxima conquista. La tablet del terror desata una nueva oleada de discusiones.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Aquí se arma la de cantina
programme.desc: Leslie e Isaac se hacen novios. Una discusión provoca que Lizbeth le moje las pestañas a Ali y se desate la guerra. El nuevo ex se lleva la sorpresa de encontrarse con dos ex-amores. Rufas tiene las llaves de la Love Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Los demonios bailan en la villa
programme.desc: Rufas le rompe el corazón a Carolina. A Jey le toca escena de celos doble. La sala tornado sopla todos los chismes de Brandon. El lobo está enjaulado mientras que Yess le hace piojitos. Una fiesta empieza bien y termina con la llegada de un ex.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores reunidos revivirán los mejores momentos de los primeros 10 episodios de sus segundas vacaciones en un especial confidencial. Pero cuidado que esto aún no termina, todavía faltan los últimos tres episodios de Súper Shore 2.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La primera noche de Karime y Labrador en la casa se celebra con una grandiosa fiesta en la que Cañete es víctima de Karime. Para salir de la dinámica de fiestas y chiringuitos de playa, los chicos planean irse de acampada.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: El cumpleaños de Arantxa se convierte en el acontecimiento del verano. Las sorpresas y las celebraciones se prolongan durante varios días de divertidísimas fiestas.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Todo lo que empieza tiene que terminar y así pasa con estas vacaciones en las costas del mediterráneo. Llega la hora en que los chicos de Súper Shore deberán de despedirse.

programme.desc: Phelps poses as a murderer to infiltrate a gang that specializes in spiriting wanted men out of the country after first brainwashing them to learn the whereabouts of their vast sums of money.

programme.desc: Phelps poses as the head of a Hollywood movie studio as part of the IMF plan to prevent a crime syndicate's takeover of the studio.

programme.desc: Phelps poses as a government investigator who must work through a crooked district attorney to prove that a crime syndicate boss killed his girlfriend.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps and Mimi take on the guises of fugitives to invade the home of Jerome Cooper, a nuclear scientist, who is threatening to destroy a major American city with a fifty-megaton hydrogen bomb.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps is kidnapped and held for ransom until Barney, Casey, and Willy can steal an incriminating letter from a safe deposit box and turn it over to crime syndicate boss Andrew Metzger.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps poses as a master chess champion to trap a criminal with a near genius mentality and his mysterious boss.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Kim Hunter guest stars as Hannah O'Connel a brilliant but superstitious criminal who escapes to a Caribbean country and is drawn into a voodoo ceremony by the IMF to locate a cache of stolen gold she has hidden away.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Laraine Stephens guest stars as the beautiful wife of a crime syndicate boss who becomes the target of both the underworld and the Impossible Missions Force when she has her husband killed and steals his records of the syndicate's operations.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees a performance by the Westminster Bell Choir and shows how people make bells. Mayor Maggie has a bell that she plays with King Friday and gives to Henrietta as a doorbell. Daniel and H.J. Elephant dress up as astronauts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers watches the tape about ducklings. Robert Troll takes Neighbor Aber to the Museum-Go-Round where Lady Elaine has set up a collection of Package Catchers (P.C.'s) in an attempt to capture the mysterious package.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a pair of crutches and a cast. He shows how to walk with crutches. King Friday continues to insist that everyone wear a "three-cornered one." Betty Okonak Templeton finds a loophole in King Friday's command.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Eric Kloss visit a cavern led by Betty Aberlin. Inside the cavern, Mr. Kloss plays his saxophone while Mister Rogers plays an organ. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday hires a tutor for Prince Tuesday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers invites viewers along on a visit to a special new playground designed and built by both adults and children. He makes up a song at the piano.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: There are lots of things people can do with their hands. Even when they are angry, they can do things with their hands that won't hurt others.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces a week of programs about the environment. He shows how things can be reused. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, there's a real-life problem -- too much garbage -- and the neighbors are trying to find a solution.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely show how they make an apple-peanut butter treat and remind children how much they learn from people other than their parents.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a pottery studio to see how Eva Kwong makes a bowl. Later, Mister Rogers talks about weddings. Betty Okonak Templeton Jones marries James Michael Jones in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Folk singer Ella Jenkins visits Mister Rogers and sings and plays a song on a harmonica. Mister Rogers has a Neighborhood board game with the different Make-Believe Neighbors.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a popcorn popper. He is introduced to Ray Detwiler who plays rare horns. Chef Brockett gives a popcorn ball to King Friday who declares there be popcorn in the opera.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Visiting a nearby dance studio, Mister Rogers watches a class of young students learning to use ribbons as part of their dance routine. Henrietta is still ringing her new bell and X the Owl is growing quite frustrated.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes to visit ice skating star Peggy Fleming, who is practicing for an ice show. They talk about how doing anything well takes a lot of practice.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Nancy Caterpillar sees herself in a mirror and realizes that she is very special the way she is. She turns into a butterfly. Mister Rogers visits the circus and sees Jeff Gabel apply his clown make-up.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers has some scuba diving equipment and imagines what a real scuba diver would see in the ocean. Some of the neighbors are frightened by Chuck Aber and Betty Okonak Templeton Jones in their scuba diving gear.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister McFeely delivers the wrong video tape. Mister Rogers reassures Mr. McFeely by singing You Are Special. King Friday is angry and belittles Miss Paulificate when she mistakenly delivers garden hoes instead of garden hose.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: It's the Neighborhood of Make-Believe Arts Festival, and all the neighbors are finding their own ways to express themselves. Mister Rogers encourages his "television friends" to appreciate the wide variety of art!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video about people who make umbrellas. It's raining in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe and Neighbor Aber is interested in a special sale at the factory where Corney has manufactured Umbrella Rockits.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a painting of the Neighborhood of Make-Believe. Mime artist Motoko demonstrates her talents by miming various activities. Trolley shows baby pictures of Prince Tuesday, King Friday and Lady Aberlin.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make towels. The Neighborhood of Make-Believe is hosting the Make-Believe Olympic Games. Lady Elaine will only agree to play if she is guaranteed to win the games.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Russian children's television host Tatiana Vedeneeva vists Mister Rogers and takes out a puppet from her program -- Stepashka, a very brave rabbit. In the Neighborhood, a visitor from the stars lands at the Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a Randy S. Caribou figure made of clay. Then, visiting a nearby soccer field, Mister Rogres meets Dave Bartholomae, a coach who is holding practice with his young players.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits the McFeelys, who are watching after young lambs. Handyman Negri and King Friday put on full cereal-proof armor. When their efforts fail, it is clear that Daniel is the only one who can stop the cereal from falling.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett invites Mister Rogers outside for some exercises. Bruce Franco carries a collection of balloon scuptures he has made for the party. He gives Mister Rogers a balloon sculpture that looks like the Neighborhood Trolley.

programme.desc: The sisters enlist Lincoln, the "Master of Convincing," to teach them how to ask their parents for money; when Lisa's report card reveals that she has failed social skills, she must make a friend in order to bring up her grade.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up; knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the children decide not to tell her about their mother's upcoming party.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Dad and Lincoln get on "Legends of the Hidden Temple" and cannot wait to for a whole day of father-and-son bonding; Lincoln wants to go to the mall but has to watch his younger sisters, so he decides to take them to the mall.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lori and Lincoln visit the city, where Lori struggles to be a city girl; Lincoln finds that Ronnie Anne has changed; the family uses stunt doubles in its plan to avoid Luan's April Fool's Day pranking.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats viajan al futuro y son diez años más grandes. Angélica aún los atormenta, Carlitos usa frenos, Tommy tiene cabello y Dil habla. Además, ahora van a la escuela y están a punto de asistir a su primer concierto para grandes.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica y Susie comienzan las clases y compiten para ver quien es la mejor estudiante preescolar y la favorita de la maestra. Pronto, su rivalidad las lleva a ocasionar un desastre y tienen que trabajar juntas para solucionar su error.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica convence a los bebés de que se transformarán en los personajes de sus disfraces a menos que le den un dulce de Halloween, y Carlitos debe enfrentarla.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy se siente rechazado cuando Firulais parece ponerle mucha atención a Fifi. Los bebés deciden organizar una boda para la pareja.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Carlitos pierde su primera tarjeta de la biblioteca, teme haber perdido su ventana al mundo. Para conseguir un poco de calma, Angélica convence a los bebés de retirarse.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica juega a la psicóloga con los bebés, pero su consejo le sale al revés. Cuando Carlitos comienza a estornudar siempre que Kimi aparece, teme que pueda ser alérgico a ella.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés causan problemas a un experto en fengshui. Los bebés piensan que el acuario en forma de barco que visitan se está hundiendo.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés intentan ayudar a sus padres, pero todo se complica. Los bebés creen que Dil se convirtió en un muñeco luego de que Angélica lo reemplazara por el suyo para ganar una exposición.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica cree que la nueva empleada del café es su muñeca Cynthia que cobró vida. Angélica promete ser buena con los bebés para siempre si Phil acepta que unas niñas de cuatro años jueguen al niño bonito con él.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Una serie de misterios surgen cuando los bebés y sus padres emprenden un viaje en tren para asistir a la segunda luna de miel de Boris y Minka, la cual se celebra en otra ciudad.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Didi anuncia que regresará a la escuela y Angélica convence a los bebés de que el tiempo irá para atrás. Carlitos se despierta de una siesta sin sueños y los bebés deciden buscar su sueño perdido.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los padres recuerdan los primeros pasos de los niños, pero ellos los recuerdan de una forma diferente. Angélica contrata a Harold para que sea su asistente personal.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando los cachorros de Firulais y Fifi son puestos en adopción, Hugo le ruega a Didi que se queden con uno. Los bebés se embarcan en una fantasía, batallando a la Malvada Señorita Angelique en una exótica tienda de mascotas.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés se dirigen al Club Fred, un lugar para descansar y relajarse. Una vez allí, los bebés deben encontrar el tesoro de Barba Azul para salvarle las vacaciones a todos.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Lili está preocupada porque no es tan perfecta como podría ser, pero luego descubre que disfruta más de su verdadero yo que el que finge ser.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés se divierten en el parque de diversiones de alta tecnología con temática de Navidad diseñado por Stu Pickles para la primera Navidad de Dil. Angélica hace que Santa renuncie.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés descubren que la Navidad significa más que regalos y tradiciones, cuando se encuentran atrapados en las decoraciones navideñas de Hugo. Angélica impulsa a Santa a renunciar.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando llevan a los bebés al circo, Carlitos teme convertirse en un payaso. Cuando Angélica ve una entrega de premios en televisión, los bebés deciden hacer su propia entrega de premios.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés encuentran una galería de juegos medievales que los lleva a una fantasía para salvar a Taffy de un feroz dragón llamado Gracko. Los bebés intentan hacer más fuerte a Dil para que pueda jugar con ellos.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés asisten a un juego de básquet y defienden a la mascota del equipo visitante: un bicho gigante. Angélica quiere la sala para ella sola.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Kimi es elegida para hacer una audición para una película, y le dicen que será una estrella. Los bebés creen que vivirá en el cielo. Los bebés creen que Taffy y Angélica intercambiaron identidades.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica le dice a los bebés que Carlitos es un extraterrestre del espacio y que la casa es su nave. Carlitos tiene temor de tocar cosas por miedo a tener contacto con gérmenes.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: El cachorro de los Finster está triste, y los bebés creen que es porque aún no le dieron un nombre. Por otro lado, una amiga de Betty viene de visita con su hija Alice, justo cuando los reportes climáticos predicen un huracán, también llamado Alice.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo, Chas, Angélica y Susie van con sus mascotas a un concurso para disputar el premio de Mejor Mascota. Taffy lleva a los bebés a su primera visita a un restaurante de comida rápida.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés acompañan a sus mamás a la venta anual para bebés, pero ellos creen que serán vendidos. Los bebés hacen un bebé de nieve y lo llaman Steve.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy pierde la paciencia en un juego y Angélica desafía a los demás. Por otro lado, Didi lleva a los bebés a la universidad y viven una aventura en el campus.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Ángelica les dice a los bebés que sus padres quieren volver a ser niños y, por eso, llevan a sus familias a un lugar de vacaciones de la infancia. Los padres de Kimi organizan una fiesta de cumpleaños especial.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Mientras escuchan un programa de radio con el Abuelo, los Rugrats juegan a ser detectives y se preponen resolver un misterio. Angélica convence a los niños de que es una vidente que puede predecir el futuro, y les pide juguetes y galletas como pago.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo y Julio compiten entre sí mientras graban los momentos más divertidos de sus hijos para ganar un premio en un concurso de un programa de televisión. Los Rugrats compiten en contra de los bebés McNulty para salvar la medalla de oro de Angélica.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo lleva a los Rugrats a un lavadero de autos, en donde los bebés se envuelven en una batalla contra Angélica. Tommy y su guía mística Sabu, cruzan el patio de los Pickles en medio de una ola de calor, para llegar a la tierra de las aguas.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés deben ayudar a Angélica a vender en su puesto de limonada, pero ella se niega a pagarles, y Susie aconseja que hagan una huelga. Carlitos y Fili se ponen vestidos para ver cómo se siente y descubren que son más frescos que los pantalones.

programme.desc: Dennis claims his ex-girlfriend Kendal keeps tied down with pregnancy lies! He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve’s DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Broderick has been an exemplary father to his 5 children, all of whom he's had to raise alone because their mother Renita abandoned them. They refuse to watch their youngest brother BJ grow up motherless and want Renita to wake up!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Chris claims that Brianna's very controlling and doesn't let him go out to do the things that make him happy. Then, Chad is here to propose to his girlfriend Star but before they book the caterer, Star has a little confession to make.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Cindy feels no love at all for her sister, Morgan. She will tell her today that she is stealing Morgan's man for good! Next Emario wants to marry Kathryn, but first she needs to come clean and reveal her secret profession as a prostitute!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: These guests say love is the last thing on their minds, it is all about the sex and they're not sorry.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mistie suspects that her boyfriend has been cheating, but she never expected with her best friend, Allison! Next Jose's 2 boyfriends didn't know that they've been sharing Jose. Finally, Antjuan hates that his girlfriend strips for a living.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Amy is here to confront her husband, Fury's, ex-mistress, Shauna, for continuing to butt into their lives. Shauna says she loves Fury but admits that she's been sleeping with her cousin, Becky! Then Becky reveals to all that she slept with Fury!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Black wants to leave his fiance Justine to be with a woman named Star. But he's about to find out that Star is actually a man. Then, Jay has to reveal to Brittany the shocking secret that he slept with her sister Donna.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Our guests have been making a living by laying on their backs and they love it. They're here to shake their sheets clean and let their loved ones know that for a certain price they can be bought.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jake is here because he says that he knew he was in love with his girlfriend Lindsey the first time she ever asked him for a side of cheese. Then Shaina says she's in love with not one but two beautiful girls.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Dallas confesses to his fiancé that he’s cheating on her with her maid of honor Brooke. Rickey and Beverly fight for the same woman and Jennifer learns about Derek’s other woman!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Beth and Eric have been dating for a year. But Eric began sleeping with Beth's sister with Beth's permission! Beth now says she only gave it because she was scared of losing Eric. Both women claim to love Eric and want him for their own.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Spirited Betty is in love with Greg, a married man, and is here to break up his home and steal him from his wife, Kirsten. Then Christina says her boyfriend, Sean, does everything she wants except he won't stop sleeping with Megan!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Bambi gives us a rare, honest look into her ultra-exclusive lifestyle in LA. Tiffany confronts C.T. over a rotten business deal.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Carl ha venido a decirle a su novia que se ha estado acostando con su peor enemiga, Keisha. A continuación, Donte le dirá a su mejor amigo, Quincy, que está acostándose con su prometida. Después, Janel y Nikkie están peleando por el mismo hombre.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Anita está dispuesta a dejar a su marido por su ex-amante. Luego Theresa está siendo infiel a su prometido con su hermano. Más tarde Kevin viene a decirle al ex de su novia, Jermaine, que se aleje.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kenny vivía con dos hermanas, Lora y Misty, que también son sus amantes, pero las trata como sirvientas. Después, Jerry confronta a Kenny con los resultados de 9 pruebas de paternidad positivas, pero Kenny dice que solamente le importan 2 de sus 9 hijos.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Hope ha venido a enfrentarse a su mejor amiga, Laura, por robarle a su novio, Joey, y luego comprometerse con él. A continuación, John dirá que no tiene la culpa por acostarse con la mejor amiga de su novia.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Misty odia tanto al marido que se acaba de casar con su mejor amiga que está dispuesta a pagar el divorcio. ¡Lucus está dispuesto a divorciarse de su esposa de 6 semanas si su familia no deja de entrometerse!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: James está comprometido con Amanda, pero ahora confiesa lo de Melanie. Después, Jewel compite por el amor de su amante cuando Christa anuncia que lo quiere para ella.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Anitra se entera de quién es realmente su pareja Kevin! Después, James está a semanas de casarse con Liz, pero tiene dos importantes secretos que contar. Después, Elliot dice que cometió el peor error de su vida al ser infiel a su novio, Rob.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jaycee le demuestra a Brandy que nunca es correcto ser infiel y arruinar a una familia. Casi cree que su prometido podría aprender una lección de Kevin, un antiguo invitado. Además, concertamos una cita entre la espectadora Tamara y el invitado Nathan.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: John está siendo infiel a su esposa Destinee con Cici, pero Cici también tiene algunos secretos. Entonces, Lala suelta un bombazo a su novio. Además, Michael y su esposa Tayliana tienen secretos que revelarse mutuamente.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jake se acostó con el prometido de su hermano Joe. Después, Danny dice que dejará a su prometida Heather por una dama de compañía profesional llamada Chelsi. Además, hay más historias de matrimonios disparatados.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Carlton ha venido a revelarle a su novia que lleva una doble vida gay. Además, Tom Bergeron de "Bailando con las Estrellas" de la TV hará de juez famoso en un concurso de baile. Luego, Crystal le revela a su marido, Bobby, su infidelidad.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Khloe está dispuesta a contarle a Jamal que quizá no sea la mujer que él cree que es. Nick ha venido a confrontar a su esposa Barbara y al hombre con el que se ha estado acostando, Jason.

programme.desc: Brook and Pedro head out in a submersible to infiltrate Big Mom's stronghold! Meanwhile, Luffy, Nami, Chopper and Carrot head into the island chasing the image of Sanji, only to be distracted by the endless supply of sweets and a second Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Lost in the bewildering woods and chasing after Sanji, Nami and the others find there's more than meets the eye in this upside down part of the Whole Cake Island! Meanwhile, Sanji confronts his brother!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy continues to move through the mysterious and dangerous woods, unaware of the danger that lurks in the trees! Meanwhile, Sanji confronts his father as the wounds of his childhood are laid bare!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji faces off against his father in a duel! His powerful kicks aim at protecting his hands, but the Germa Family has more in store for him yet! Meanwhile, Luffy goes deeper into the Seducing Woods and falls for their powerful illusions!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Big Mom has Caesar Clown at her whims - and despite his bilking her out of countless amounts of money - she is ready to continue her pursuit of maniacal world control!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Finally, Nami finds Luffy and recounts her harrowing tale of battling Brulee! Meanwhile, the mysterious half-buried man comes clean about his true identity! But this must all be put aside when one of Mom's most powerful generals comes calling!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The identity of the enigmatic Pound, the man half-buried in the woods, is revealed, but his deep connection to Big Mom might not be enough to save him! Nami's past exploits, however, hold the key to keeping Mom's minions at bay!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy squares off against Cracker, one of the Sweet 3 Generals, as Nami learns the truth about others in the Worst Generation who have come before to challenge Big Mom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy continues to fight against Cracker, whose powers to manipulate his surroundings may prove more troublesome than he had thought! Meanwhile, Brook and Pedro infiltrate the Whole Cake Island - and must hatch a plan to avoid getting caught!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The wind starts to go out of Luffy's sails as he fights an endless army of Biscuit Warriors! Meanwhile, the oldest two Vinsmoke brothers come home from a war to see their long-missing young brother Sanji.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy starts to run out of steam as the Biscuit Warriors keep multiplying! If he can buy himself 10 minutes to recharge…

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy needs just 10 minutes to recharge! Nami comes to rescue with the help of the Homies! Meanwhile, Sanji learns the terrible truth of Germa's power - and his father's dark history!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami challenges Cracker on her own! During the all-out fight, she loses her advantage and is close to defeat. Can Luffy bounce back in time? Meanwhile, Sanji's tragic childhood is made clear.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The terrible history of Sanji's family continue to unfold. From a rare moment of compassion, he is able to escape, only to face his father's cruelty before setting out on his own.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is in an all-out, all-you-can-eat battle! As Cracker's endless stream of Biscuit Warriors marches on, Luffy's endless appetite is put to the test. Meanwhile, Reiju helps Sanji to straighten himself out before he meets his fiancée.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy needs to think fast in order to turn the battle in his favor - filled with biscuits, he debuts a new Gear Four attack that has lasting repercussions! Meanwhile, Chopper and Carrot find Sanji's reflection, but can they get a message to him in time?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy finally catches up with Sanji! However, as a happy past plays before his eyes in which he, Sanji, and the crew deepened their bonds, a new page is turning in the history of the Straw Hats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji's journey with the crew looks to be coming to an end!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes a solemn promise to not move from his spot until Sanji returns to him. But as Mama's army advances, that promise may prove a costly one. Meanwhile, Sanji and the Vinsmokes come face to face with Big Mom and his bride-to-be Pudding!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy stands his ground and waits for his friend to return! But the vengeful army washes over him - only a true friend can step in to turn the tide of battle! Meanwhile, Sanji and Pudding discuss their marriage - and come to a startling conclusion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy puts his all into battling Big Mom's vengeful army, however, their skills combined prove too formidable. Meanwhile, Sanji goes to Big Mom herself to bargain for the Straw Hats lives - with shocking results!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Carrot are captured by Brulee and strung up for dinner! But Chopper sees a chance to free himself! Meanwhile, Brook and Pedro launch a plan to reach the Ponegliffs - a daring game of chance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Pekoms creates a diversion for Brook to set his plan into action. Meanwhile, Luffy continues to goad Big Mom into a fight, and Pudding begins to have stirrings of rebellion herself!

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Pablo and Kelly notice something ominous between the Book and Brujo's pendant. Ash promises to visit Lem, but Fisher shows up for an almighty showdown with her former boss.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash, Pablo and Kelly, now joined by Fisher, arrive at the survivalist camp in the midst of chaos and must go to extreme measures to escape. Meanwhile, more is revealed of Ruby's mission.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash attempts to bury the book to end the Evil, but first he must contend with other, more physical things from his past. Fisher faces a horrific change in Ash.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash battles someone all too familiar, and later hears a message from the Necronomicon. Meanwhile, the deadliest Deadite attacks.

programme.title: Sanctuary

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will, Kate and Bigfoot struggle to prevent an all-out Abnormal war.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will and Magnus must explain a mission gone wrong to a UN Inspector before the Sanctuary's funding is cut off.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus's mission to an African island touches off a tense hostage situation.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: When Lili's (Lisa Howard) shuttle is stolen by a friend whose space mission to Mars has been canceled by the Taelons, Boone (Kevin Kilner) and Augur (Richard Chevolleau) end up helping him complete his expedition.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: When a deadly weapon bioengineered by the Taelons is stolen from their research lab, Commander William Boone (Kevin Kilner) must find the scientist (Jonathan Potts) behind the theft before disaster occurs.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Da'an (Leni Parker) is held for ransom by a group of renegade soldiers who claim the Taelons sacrificed their unit during radical bioengineering experiments.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The resistance does battle with an alien probe that may be studying Earth.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Sandoval (Von Flores) reunites with his wife when the implant in his brain degenerates, setting him free from Taelon mind control but endangering his life.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew seeks a lost colony of Nietzscheans and discovers another crew that has been secretly helping them.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew installs a new AI in a new Commonwealth battleship, and naturally, things don't go as they should.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A retired couple are found beaten to death in their country club estate, but detectives soon discover that what happens in Vegas doesn't always stay there as they hunt down this monstrous killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed to death and suspects include a warlock and a rumored Wiccan lover; the case goes unsolved for years, until a triple homicide leads investigators to a dark obsession that costs four people their lives.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A local beauty queen is found dead in a lake; as her small town grieves, law enforcement finds itself on a 20-plus year investigation that leads to a killer who was hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: An apartment fire proves to be arson set to cover up the murder of a young woman, but the discovery of a secret double life and unique evidence leads detectives to the killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A witness comes face to face with the killer of a small-town beautician, but despite having an eyewitness, it would take years and a surprise tip to lead detectives to who strangled a beloved member of the community.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a 4-year-old finds his great-grandparents melted, he runs for help, launching an investigation into their double murder; a young woman disappears, leaving the Memphis, Tenn., community hoping for her safe return.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young woman disappears, leaving the community hoping for her safe return; when she is found murdered, a string of mysterious anonymous tips takes detectives into a toxic world of jealousy and obsession.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A missing persons case becomes something much darker when a sick, sinister affair is uncovered, leading investigators to believe foul play is involved.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The mysterious shooting of a restaurateur with no solid suspects and no murder weapon leaves detectives in a lurch, but when financial motives come to light, an undercover operation and clever forensic investigation turn the case upside-down.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A military veteran is missing and a young student is murdered in what appears to be a crime of passion, but the discovery of a secret payout leads police on a wild chase.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: Passions and obsessions turn toxic when a beautiful young law student is found murdered and left in a trash can, leaving police to decipher a web of boyfriends, exes and unrequited lovers.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The wife of a Marine, a pregnant dominatrix and a sex slave cross paths in a twisted tale of kidnapping, lies and murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mom does all she can to provide for her kids, including taking up with five sugar daddies to make ends meet, but when jealousy rears its ugly head, this mom winds up dead and her killer is not who you would expect.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: To keep their marriage fresh, a young couple turns to a life of sex games and sharing spouses, but when threesomes and foursomes lead to murder, investigators struggle to prove who killed this swinger.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A lover's quarrel and a quick cash scheme lead to the murder of a happy retiree; the Hollywood community is stunned when a body is found under its most famous landmark.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother becomes a murder victim while living a double life; a web of deception, sex and murder sends detectives on a multi-year hunt to figure out who could have murdered her.

programme.desc: In this episode, prior winners return to prove who among them is the best of the best by forging a blade using canoe damascus. With $10,000 and their reputation on the line, which smith will survive?

programme.desc: Four competitors must forge weld blades for friction folders from tiny cubes of steel. After hammering through the testing, two smiths will return home where they will forge a German Zweihander.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan y Paula continúan sufriendo en silencio por no estar juntos. Julieta alucina con que tuvo intimidad con Juan. Ella, preocupada, acude al médico para recibir los resultados de sus exámenes. Gaspar se disculpa con Lupe quien condiciona su regreso.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Un hombre se presenta como esposo de Paula y revela verdades desconocidas, esta noticia le da una vuelta a la relación con Juan. Julieta esconde su enfermedad. Beatriz y Guadalupe cosechan éxitos como cantantes.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan le pide a Paula que se vaya de la hacienda, pero ella se niega a irse. Esteban provoca a Juan y este reacciona con violencia, ya que no logra controlar sus celos. A Julieta se le intensifica su dolor de cabeza y sigue con su camino lleno de venganzas.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula confiesa su amor a Juan, pero él le pide renunciar al dinero y a Esteban, como una prueba de lealtad. Ella no puede cumplirle, decide empacar y marcharse lejos. Julieta recibe el terrible diagnóstico y lo mantiene en secreto.

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.desc: On the penultimate leg of the Race, two strong teams make a potentially one-million-dollar mistake. Also, Phil Keoghan greets the teams with shocking news at the Pit Stop.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.desc: Teams race through Nagano, Japan where Racers take on an Olympic-sized Detour, and one team takes a tumble that may jeopardize their chances in the Race.

programme.desc: Racers strap on lederhosen for a trip to Oktoberfest in Bavaria, Germany, and one team finds their race in jeopardy after losing their fanny pack.

programme.desc: The competition heats up as the final five teams race to Amsterdam and take a dip in a floating hot tub in search of their next clue.

programme.desc: The final five teams travel to Peru, where the Race gets physical and teams use their fitness trackers to help find their next clue. Also, Blair and Hayley's communication issues reach a boiling point.

programme.desc: In the penultimate leg, the final four teams race through Peru for a spot in the finale and a chance at the $1 million prize.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An ex-convict is blamed for a brutal crime despite his claims of rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is out for vengeance when Mark is used as a pawn in a bank robbery scheme.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas shoots a horse thief who turns out to be a member of the Boyle clan. Now Ma Boyle is after him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Seven condemned murderers escape and take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds gold on their property, a fast-talking salesman who tried to sell Lucas a new lightning rod offers instead to buy the ranch's mineral rights.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tracks an escaped prisoner to a town that turns out to be run by the gunman's brother who is notorious for shooting people in the back.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshall Torrance out of town, Only Lucas can stop him from lynching a local man who killed one of the members of his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former army captain comes to North Fork to kill the man who shot down his son in a gunfight - Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new store owner upsets the town by demanding all credit accounts be paid off.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The widow of a bandit killed by Lucas plots a grotesque revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his friend become trapped in an old mine.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark attempt to reform a con-man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas encourages a drunken artist charged with murder to use his talents to identify the true killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark try to persuade a persecuted young mute to return stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A lively old lady arrives in town hot on the trail of a notorious bandit and the reward money for capturing him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A doctor seeks revenge on the man he blames for ruining his practice.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas unmasks a killer posing as a door-to-door seed salesman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Marshall Torrance run into trouble while transporting a captured killer back to face trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deathbed request from an old friend sends Lucas to a neighboring town in search of the man's long-lost sweetheart.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas thinks he has seen a ghost when a young man, eerily similar to a man he killed in the Civil War, challenges him to a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas agrees to take a job as an undercover agent and goes to investigate rumors of the sales of arms to renegade Indians. His life is endangered by the town drunk who stumbles onto his true identity.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Lucas is in Wyoming on the trail of a gang illegally selling weapons to the Indians, Mark stays with Miss Milly, where he suffers from loneliness and doubt with his father gone for 2 months.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas looks for answers when recovering alcoholic Micah Torrence returns to the bottle and turns in his badge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: In a ghost town, Lucas, Mark and Micah tangle with the Newman family and learn the secret of the town's 20-year-old mystery of a lost gold mine.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Blinded in an explosion, Lucas fights despair as he prepares for a meeting with a gun-toting enemy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deranged ex-prisoner of war, cruelly abused in a Northern army prison, captures Lucas, locks him in a cage and vows to make him suffer for his part in the Civil War.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A traveling salesman can't talk his way out of an assault charge.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Woodrow, a janitor living in the year 1890, accidentally activates a time traveling helmet which transports him to 1962 - then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A gung-ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paul Radin has invited three people to join him in his bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Actor Rance McGrew makes TV Westerns for a living, but he's a lousy actor and a worse cowboy. Despite that, each week he "wins" against the bad guys. Finally, the bad guys have had enough and decide to teach McGrew a lesson.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The senior residents of Sunnyvale decide that the secret to youth is acting young, and in particular playing a childhood game called "kick-the-can."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Fortune discovers that a piano he bought his wife for her birthday has magical properties - the music that it plays makes people reveal their true essence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jeff Myrtlebank comes back to life at his own funeral and soon begins to act very strangely...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Kanamits, 9-foot tall aliens, arrive on Earth with one lofty goal: To Serve Man.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Awakened by the cries of their daughter Bettina, Chris and Ruth Miller enter her room to find that she has vanished - even though they still hear her crying for help. Chris' physicist friend Bill thinks she moved into another dimension.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: David Gurney wakes up to find that no one - his wife, his co-workers, his best friend, not even his own mother knows him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An astronaut declares himself a god when his ship lands on a planet populated by people smaller than ants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Oliver Crangle is a bitter, prejudiced man. Through unknown means, he intends to shrink every evil person in the world at four o'clock.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A loud-mouthed braggart's boasts attract the attention of some aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An elderly couple visit the New Life Corporation, hoping to transport their personalities into youthful artificial bodies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An alien who crash-lands into a remote mountain village stirs up the villagers' fears and animosity, but he befriends a little boy and gives him a mysterious present.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy, Willie, is alive and evil. He makes plans for a new act with a new dummy: plans that Willie doesn't support!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple briefly returns to the groom's childhood home, the ties of the past prove too strong to resist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A widower buys a robot grandmother for his three children.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After facing all of the recent trials, a slight detour may offer the solution that the group has been seeking.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group feels beaten after living life on the road, but must continue to trudge along in spite of the changes they have incurred.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After withstanding a spectacular storm, Rick and the others meet what appears to be a friendly person, but find themselves mistrustful.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group has a difficult time molding to a new lifestyle, forcing them to consider whether they can be the people they once were.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As Rick and the others continue to acclimate to their new surroundings, they consider a return to normalcy.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While trying to secure a new home, Rick and his group face challenges, and question the utopia they find themselves in.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: When life within the walls begins to mimic life outside, the group realizes that sheltered life may not be possible.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl finds trouble while on a run; Rick and the group feel like outsiders in Alexandria, where trouble approaches the gates.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the others have a difficult time assimilating into Alexandria; a new threat arises that could bring the group closer together.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: When it appears that things are starting to normalize in the settlement, a new problem arises for the Alexandrians.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A small group, including Rick, runs into hurdles while trying to return to Alexandria, and some may not make it back.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan recalls his travels from King County to Alexandria, where he encountered a solo survivor who taught him a new code to live by.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The sheltered citizens inside the walls of Alexandria must face a grim reality that might be too much for them to handle; Deanna doubts her leadership.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Abraham and Sasha encounter many obstacles and a new threat while trying to return to Alexandria.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alexandria is finally able to begin pulling itself back together; peace is embraced between the two groups.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After a few moments of peace, trouble finds its way to Alexandria again with a threat that may be too big to defeat.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick vaga por el bosque y encuentra a Gabriel, un párroco al que salvan de una horda de zombis y les permite pernoctar en su iglesia. Sin embargo, hay algo extraño en él y esa misma noche uno de los integrantes del grupo es secuestrado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Gareth y su grupo de caníbales atacan la iglesia mientras Rick y sus compañeros están en el bosque buscándolos para vengar a Bob. Además, el padre Gabriel confiesa el siniestro acto de su pasado que no deja descansar a su conciencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Beth se despierta en un hospital de Atlanta, pero pronto se da cuenta de que los mismos que la auxiliaron y sanaron no la dejarán marchar. No obstante, su nuevo amigo, Noah, y ella tratan de huir del recinto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras se dirigen hacia el norte, el grupo se ve obligado a detenerse porque una horda de zombis bloquea el camino. La tensión aumenta y la situación termina por estallar cuando Eugene confiesa un secreto que había ocultado a todos hasta ahora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Daryl persiguen a los captores de Beth por una Atlanta devastada, pero su auto se queda sin gasolina y deben pasar la noche en un refugio para mujeres.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Noah regresan a la iglesia para pedirles ayuda a sus compañeros. Rick y otros integrantes del grupo van a Atlanta con la intención de secuestrar a varios policías para intercambiarlos por Beth y Carol.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick busca una salida pacífica al conflicto, pero sus enemigos la rechazan y prefieren zanjar las cosas de forma violenta.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Para cumplir con la promesa que Beth le hizo Noah antes de morir, el grupo se dirige al barrio de Noah, esperando hallar allí protección y a otros supervivientes. Sin embargo, Rick y los suyos no quieren hacerse demasiadas esperanzas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El vehículo se avería y el grupo continúa a pie hacia Washington D. C., pero les sorprende una tormenta y buscan cobijo en un granero, donde encuentran algo totalmente inesperado e inquietante.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron invita al grupo a Alexandria, su comunidad, un lugar que, según él, es seguro y amigable. Rick, incapaz de olvidar Woodbury y Terminus, desconfía de Aaron, pero Michonne quiere darle una oportunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los integrantes del grupo tienen entrevistas con Deanna, la jefa de Alexandria, y esperan en las casas que les asignan a saber si son aceptados o rechazados. Cuando conocen a los habitantes de la comunidad, perciben que no están bien entrenados.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick, Daryl y Carol se reúnen en secreto para planear cómo recuperar sus armas del arsenal de Alexandria, ya que temen que, si algo sale mal, van a necesitarlas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol le sugiere a Rick que deben asesinar a Pete porque es violento con su esposa e hijo. Por otra parte, Gabriel advierte a Deanna que desconfíe del grupo de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Deanna y Rick se culpan mutuamente de las muertes de Aidenn y Noah. Rick le ofrece a Jessie protección ante Pete, pero este lo descubre y se enzarza en una pelea con él. La tensión en Alexandria aumenta y algo terrible se avecina.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Deanna quiere expulsar al grupo de Rick de Alexandria y ellos se preparan para defenderse. Sin embargo, la llegada de una banda de asaltantes y la irrupción de una horda de zombis interrumpen el enfrentamiento entre los dos bandos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y Morgan encuentran una horda descomunal de zombis en una cantera cercana a Alexandria. Entretanto, Carter convoca a varios habitantes de Alexandria para proponerles un plan: matar a Rick.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Masquerading as a polished gunfighter with a dishonorable discharge from the Army, James T. West arrives in Quemada, New Mexico, in a plush private railroad carwith orders from President Ulysses S. Grant to quell the terrorist activities.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Jim West and Artemus Gordon match wits with an arch-criminal of grandiose ambitions that plans to reclaim the empire of Mexico and establish himself as a new Napoleon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Dr. Loveless, a dwarf, watches his giant assistant, Voltaire, subdue a dock guardas he (Loveless) pre-pares to kill disembarking Prof. Neilsen, arriving to present his formula for a new explosive to the U.S.government.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Four men, aided by a guard named Foxx, gain entrance to the U.S. Mint in Carson City and connect a hose to a street gaslight in order to asphyxiate three workers.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A man from the Attorney General's office in Washington is killed while attempting to take the wanted John Avery into custody, so secret agent James T.West is assigned to the task.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Traffic on the lower Mississippi River has come to a virtual standstill because of the marauding tactics of a blind pirate leader and his cutthroat gang.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: James T. West is blamed for an impending international crisis when a quantity of priceless 'franconium,' a substance of fantastic power and owned by France, is stolen from under his nose at the French Consulate.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon determine to track down a missing Albanian princess when the regal young lady they have been guarding turns out to be an impostor.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Cheyenne Indians are believed responsible for the daily death of five laborers whoare working to construct a railroad line. It is claimed that the Indians will stop the attacks if they are paid $500,000 in gold spikes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West fights off an unprovoked knife-wielding assailant and then meets a beautiful blonde named Marie.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: U.S. agent James T. West enlists in a secret army of fanatics whose demented leader is plotting to overthrow United States Army units stationed in the Southwest.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon go after Dr. Cadwallader, demented geologist who is systematically devastating the state of Wyoming with man-made earthquakes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Gov. Bradford and his secretary, Miss Piecemeal, watch as the governor's statue is unveiled during a private showing at the Bolt Museum. Suddenly, the statue blinks, and Bradford, immobilized by an injection, is taken prisoner.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: U.S. secret agent James T. West is lured into a hospital where he is gassed and carried out in a coffin by the weird, zombie-like aides of one Dr. Arcularis.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A bay window is removed and reframed for a new. An old school is being restored into apartments for veterans. The underside of a deck is the "roof" of living space below. Pipe locations are discussed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: An exterior wall is framed on ground and raised into place. A history of framing tools is given. Recessed lighting and electrical panels are discussed. An old ridge beam is replaced with three LVLs.
